computed_from: Initial defaults from Zak weekly-report + HG-specific BEP canonical (Olly's BEP work); refine once 8+ weeks of daily data available.

cogs.note: HG food-heavy mix (dumplings, shared plates) runs ~32-35% blended — heavier than Stow

wages.note: Zak-set 30% target — hospitality benchmark; splits kitchen + FOH

gp.note: Higher is better — 68% target; status inversion not yet implemented so alerts left empty

seasonal_factors.note: Placeholder — will be populated once 6+ months of HG daily data available.

day_of_week_weights.note: Placeholder — will use HG sales-lookup data to compute typical Mon-Sun revenue pattern.
